name: hermes-electron-app
description: HERMES cross-platform Electron UI + Node agent

scripts.build:assets: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:renderer; Copy-Item -Path 'src\renderer\index.html' -Destination 'dist\renderer' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'src\renderer\styles' -Destination 'dist\renderer' -Recurse -Force"
scripts.build:app: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:ts; npm run build:assets; npm run build:native"
scripts.build: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:app; npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --publish never"
scripts.build:bundle: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build; powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-client-bundle.ps1"
scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:ts; npm run build:assets; Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; electron ."
scripts.start:dev: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm run build:ts; npm run build:assets; Remove-Item Env:ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."

author: Your Name
